CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Off Calendar

Cross-Complainant Troy Luchessis Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Clark Property Management, Inc., And Steve Clark, Individually And Dba Clark Property Management
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Cross-Complainant Troy Luchessis motion for entry of default judgment against Clark Property Management, and Steve Clark, individually and DBA Clark Property Management.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:30:19 a.m. and concluding at 10:42:38 a.m.

Cross-Complainant Troy Luchessis appearing represented by Jim Sansone, Esq., is placed under oath, and testifies via Zoom Video Conference.
Cross-Defendant Clark Property Management not appearing.
Cross-Defendant Steve Clark, invidually and DBA Clark Property Management not appearing.

Counsel for Cross-Complainant presents summary of facts and an offer of proof.

TROY LUCHESSIS is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by cross-complainant and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the cross-complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Cross-Complainant Troy Luchessis, and against Cross-Defendants Clark Property Management, Inc. and Steve Clark, individually and dba Clark Property Management, as follows:

1. Damages: $150,000.00
2. Costs: $6,210.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $156,210.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed as modified.
